context. it’s not the first time kazutora’s been thrown into jail for something he committed. it’s his second time being placed into confinement. 10 years of jail time, he hates it—hates the confined space, bad prison food, the delinquent inmates who always got something to say.

he hated everything, but you.

kazutora’s latched onto you. he can’t believe it - there’s someone in this prison who actually pays proper attention to him, and shows him some affection he’s never received from anyone. he’s obsessed, totally, no one’s ever been so kind to him! he really just wants you all to himself... you wouldn’t resist, right?
